source_pr.title: *: fix data race at the UnistoreRPCClientSendHook
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #42008

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Go data race on the global test hook `unistore.UnistoreRPCClientSendHook` (mockstore/unistore) when tests assign the hook while `RPCClient.SendRequest` concurrently loads/calls it under a failpoint.
failure_signature: Go data race: concurrent read/write of `UnistoreRPCClientSendHook` (mockstore/unistore RPC SendRequest hook)
root_cause_explanation: The flake was caused by a Go data race on the global `UnistoreRPCClientSendHook`: test code overwrote the hook function while the Unistore mock RPC client concurrently read/called it (via the `unistoreRPCClientSendHook` failpoint). This PR fixes the unsynchronized shared state by switching the hook to an `atomic.Pointer[func(*tikvrpc.Request)]` and using `Load()`/`Store()` for concurrent-safe access.
fix_pattern: Replace an unsynchronized global hook function variable with an `atomic.Pointer` and use `Load()`/`Store()` in both the call path and tests to eliminate concurrent read/write races.

evidence: evidence: *: fix data race at the UnistoreRPCClientSendHook

Changed files (3): executor/resource_tag_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, store/mockstore/unistore/rpc.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
